ogTitle: Valla Beach vs Varroville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Valla Beach and Varroville.
heading: Valla Beach vs Varroville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Valla Beach, New South Wales and Varroville, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Valla Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Varroville (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Valla Beach or Varroville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Valla Beach has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Varroville scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Valla Beach scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Varroville scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Valla Beach or Varroville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Valla Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
